## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated.
- [ ] If touching invariants: property test added under `tests/property/`.
- [ ] Public API changes reflected in `docs/api.md` and `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] No new Bakhtin/literary jargon in public function names.
- [ ] `to_scalar(policy='refuse')` still raises (or ADR added if relaxing).
- [ ] `schema_version` bumped if wire format changed; migration note in `docs/migration.md`.
